use_cases: Triggers form submissions with customizable visual feedback
Provides primary and secondary call-to-action buttons for web applications
Creates interactive icon buttons with Lucide icon support
Implements accessible dropdown or expandable menu triggers with keyboard navigation
Serves as a versatile button system for building complex UI components like dialogs and tooltips
ai_summary: A versatile, accessibility-focused button component with 10 visual variants (primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, dim, foreground, inverse) using class-variance-authority. Supports disabled, focus-visible, and open states with configurable hover effects and icon integration via Lucide icons. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility, suitable for SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, and general web application interfaces.
